mapper.select: SELECT cr.index_link,cr.info FROM chaos_admin ca LEFT JOIN chaos_admin_role car ON ca.mu = car.admin_mu LEFT JOIN chaos_role cr ON car.role_mu = cr.mu WHERE ca.mu = #{mu}
SELECT ca.username, ca. NAME, ca.`status`, ca.platform_mu, car.role_mu, ca.phone FROM chaos_admin ca LEFT JOIN chaos_admin_role car ON car.admin_mu = ca.mu WHERE ca.mu = #{mu}

SELECT ca.mu, ca.username, ca. NAME, ca.`status`, ca.platform_mu, car.role_mu FROM chaos_admin ca LEFT JOIN chaos_admin_role car ON car.admin_mu = ca.mu WHERE ca.platform_mu = #{query.platformMu} and car.role_mu = #{query.roleMu} and ca.status = #{query.status}
